_publications._publicationTitle: Canonical Wnt/β-catenin signaling drives human schwann cell transformation, progression, and tumor maintenance.

_contextSnippet: in the S462 cell line, even approached 100%, demonstrating that co-targeting the Wnt and mTOR pathways is synergistic in inducing apoptosis
details: Combination treatment with IC25 doses of RAD-001 and Wnt inhibitors approached 100% TUNEL-positive cells
